description: Validates that context is isolated for directives, not just interpolations.

diagnostics.messageContains: Elements with 'p-for' directives should have a unique 'p-key' binding for efficient updates

assertNodes.description: First static card: Interpolation vs. Directive

assertOnSubExpression.description: Interpolation should have the correct context for the FIRST invocation.
p-text directive should also have the correct context for the FIRST invocation. (THIS MAY FAIL)

assertNodes.description: Second static card: Interpolation vs. Directive

assertOnSubExpression.description: Interpolation should have the correct context for the SECOND invocation.
p-text directive should also have the correct context for the SECOND invocation.
Interpolation in a loop should have the correct context.
p-text directive in a loop should also have the correct context.
